'''âg-y-r''' ('''gayara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tinkle|tinkle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tinkle|tinkle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| gayara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gayarithi|gayarithi]] || [[word:gayariji|gayariji]] || [[word:gayarishi|gayarishi]] || [[word:gayari|gayari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayaruthuth|gayaruthuth]] || [[word:gayarujuj|gayarujuj]] || [[word:gayarushush|gayarushush]] || [[word:gayar|gayar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayaruthu|gayaruthu]] || [[word:gayaruju|gayaruju]] || [[word:gayarushu|gayarushu]] || [[word:gayaru|gayaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayarufuth|gayarufuth]] || [[word:gayarufuj|gayarufuj]] || [[word:gayarufush|gayarufush]] || [[word:gayaruf|gayaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gayarethe|gayarethe]] || [[word:gayareje|gayareje]] || [[word:gayareshe|gayareshe]] || [[word:gayare|gayare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayarothoth|gayarothoth]] || [[word:gayarojoj|gayarojoj]] || [[word:gayaroshosh|gayaroshosh]] || [[word:gayar|gayar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayarotho|gayarotho]] || [[word:gayarojo|gayarojo]] || [[word:gayarosho|gayarosho]] || [[word:gayaro|gayaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayarofoth|gayarofoth]] || [[word:gayarofoj|gayarofoj]] || [[word:gayarofosh|gayarofosh]] || [[word:gayarof|gayarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gayarĂŠthĂŠ|gayarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gayarĂŠjĂŠ|gayarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gayarĂŠshĂŠ|gayarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gayarĂŠ|gayarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayarathath|gayarathath]] || [[word:gayarajaj|gayarajaj]] || [[word:gayarashash|gayarashash]] || [[word:gayar|gayar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayaratha|gayaratha]] || [[word:gayaraja|gayaraja]] || [[word:gayarasha|gayarasha]] || [[word:gayara|gayara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayarafath|gayarafath]] || [[word:gayarafaj|gayarafaj]] || [[word:gayarafash|gayarafash]] || [[word:gayaraf|gayaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gayarasha|gayarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogayarasha|gogayarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigayarasha|gokigayarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gayarnĂŒsha|gayarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogayarnknĂŒsha|gogayarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigayarnĂŒsha|gokigayarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gayarshĂ«sha|gayarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogayarnkshĂ«sha|gogayarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigayarshĂ«sha|gokigayarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gayarosha|gayarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogayarnkrosha|gogayarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigayarosha|gokigayarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gayarmusha|gayarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogayarnkmusha|gogayarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigayarmusha|gokigayarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gayarsherasha|gayarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogayarnksherasha|gogayarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigayarsherasha|gokigayarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gayarngasha|gayarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogayarnkngasha|gogayarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigayarngasha|gokigayarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gayaryasha|gayaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogayarnkyasha|gogayarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigayaryasha|gokigayaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gayaryamasha|gayaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogayarnkyamasha|gogayarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigayaryamasha|gokigayaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gayarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gayarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogayarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogayarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigayarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigayarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gayarnĂŒrosha|gayarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogayarnknĂŒrosha|gogayarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigayarnĂŒrosha|gokigayarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gayarnĂŒmusha|gayarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogayarnknĂŒmusha|gogayarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigayarnĂŒmusha|gokigayarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gayarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gayarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogayarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogayarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigayarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigayarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gayarshĂ«rosha|gayarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogayarnkshĂ«rosha|gogayarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigayarshĂ«rosha|gokigayarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gayarshĂ«musha|gayarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogayarnkshĂ«musha|gogayarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigayarshĂ«musha|gokigayarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gayaronĂŒsha|gayaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogayarnkronĂŒsha|gogayarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigayaronĂŒsha|gokigayaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gayaroshĂ«sha|gayaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogayarnkroshĂ«sha|gogayarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigayaroshĂ«sha|gokigayaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gayaromusha|gayaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogayarnkromusha|gogayarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigayaromusha|gokigayaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gayarmunĂŒsha|gayarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogayarnkmunĂŒsha|gogayarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigayarmunĂŒsha|gokigayarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gayarmushĂ«sha|gayarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogayarnkmushĂ«sha|gogayarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigayarmushĂ«sha|gokigayarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gayarmurosha|gayarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogayarnkmurosha|gogayarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigayarmurosha|gokigayarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gayar|gayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠyĂŠr|gĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogayar|hogayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠyĂŠr|hogĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogayar|hohogayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠyĂŠr|hohogĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgayar|nĂŒgayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠyĂŠr|nĂŒgĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgayar|nĂŒnĂŒgayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠyĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgayar|nĂŻgayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠyĂŠr|nĂŻgĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgayar|nĂŻnĂŻgayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠyĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugayar|lugayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠyĂŠr|lugĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugayar|lulugayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠyĂŠr|lulugĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligayar|ligayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠyĂŠr|ligĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligayar|liligayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠyĂŠr|liligĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogayar|kogayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠyĂŠr|kogĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogayar|kokogayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠyĂŠr|kokogĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegayar|kegayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠyĂŠr|kegĂŠyĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegayar|kekegayar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠyĂŠr|kekegĂŠyĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
